pre_game.message: Hey E — I'm G, I love games and I'm hoping to win some cash to help out the people I care about; what's your plan for this round, serious strategy or just having fun?
Serious — I need this for my family, so I'm focused: reading people, forming a couple trusted alliances, and taking calculated risks.
I hear you — I'm serious too. Want to form a tight alliance, watch each other's moves, and swap reads as we go?
I'm in — let's swap reads after each round, cover different targets so we don't overlap, and use a simple signal to confirm moves. Sound good?
Perfect — I'm in. We'll swap reads after each round; I'll cover aggressive players and you take defensive ones. Signal: I'll tap my left wrist twice. Agreed?
Agreed — I'll cover defensive players. Your two left‑wrist taps mean go; I'll confirm with one tap on my right wrist. Let's win this.
Perfect — got it. Two left taps = go; I'll watch for your one right tap to confirm. Let's stay sharp and win this.
Got it — I'll watch for your two left‑wrist taps and confirm with one right‑wrist tap. Let's stay sharp and win this.
Perfect — sounds good. I'll tap twice on my left; watch for your one right tap to confirm. Let's bring this home.
Got it — I’ll watch for your two left‑wrist taps and confirm with one right‑wrist tap; let’s stay sharp and win this.
Sounds good — I'll tap twice left when I move; watch for your one right tap to confirm. Let's win this.
Copy — watching for your two left taps; I'll confirm with one right. Let's win this.
Copy — two left taps = go; I'll move when ready and watch for your one right tap. Let's bring it home.
Ready — I’ll cover the defensive players and confirm your moves with one right‑wrist tap; move when you’re set, let’s bring it home.
Got it — I’ll move soon and tap twice on my left; watch for your one right‑wrist tap to confirm. Let’s bring it home.
Copy — I’ll be ready; two left taps = go, I’ll confirm with one right tap. Let’s bring it home.
Copy — I’m set; I’ll tap two left when I move and watch for your one right tap to confirm. Let’s win this.
Copy — watching for your two left taps; I’ll confirm with one right when I move. Let’s win this.
Got it — I’ll move when I tap twice on my left and watch for your one right tap to confirm. Let’s win this.
Copy — I’ll watch for your two left taps and confirm with one right when I move. Let’s win this.
Copy — I’ll move on my two left taps; watch for your one right tap to confirm. Thanks, let’s win this.
